problem id: 6f91481e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  11101000 -> 00000000
  00010010 -> 00000000
  01101101 -> 10000000
  01010101 -> 10100000
  10000001 -> 00000000
  10100001 -> 00000000
  00100010 -> 01000000
  10011001 -> 00100000
  00011100 -> 00000000

query: 01100111
predicted answer: 11000000
